comment.body: My last thought for this bit is that while today was outside the expected, it was certainly possible and there was enough information by 10AM to see the dip coming if you came in with a blank slate (which is hard for me and I presume many to do, but must be learned!) - even then I would have targeted 6850 due to the spread and weekly POC, but fully capitalized on it

comment.body: People need a period of adjustment between their own plan and the text of alma.  It is not immediate. comment.body:
he made very good momentum trades in 2021-2022, then started a discord. 
sometimes i commented him, and he dmed me in late '23, bit flirty but kind, and invited me to his discord.
there i shared thoughts, trade ideas, sometimes faded him, he respected me, but didn't like that...
thats where i know JFinn a bit, i helped him sometimes...
and when volsig claimed i'm an ai profile, we got a conflict with RT, 
the end.
